# Northvalley Intelligence

Northvalley Intelligence helps local service businesses in Cobb, Paulding, and Douglas counties get found, convert leads, and clean up the workflows behind the work.

Primary site: https://northvalleyintel.com
Contact: hello@northvalleyintel.com
Service area focus: Marietta, Cobb County, Paulding County, Douglas County, and nearby Atlanta metro service areas.

## What Northvalley Does

Northvalley is a custom software company using AI agents to make practical, workflow-shaped software more accessible. The public website speaks in customer language because owners usually start with lead, follow-up, scheduling, and workflow problems rather than software requirements.

Northvalley helps practical service businesses improve the full path from local discovery to lead conversion to operational follow-through. Those conversations become the entry point for better workflow, automation, AI-agent systems, and custom software when that is the right next step.

The work includes:

- Website Growth Assessment
- Custom software assessment
- AI-agent workflow systems
- Local lead path assessment
- Operational AI assessment
- Knowledge chaos assessment
- AI-answer readiness and local search clarity
- Workflow modernization for lead intake, scheduling, follow-up, customer information, and repeated work

## Website Growth Assessment

The Website Growth Assessment is not a generic SEO score, security scan, or technical website doctor. It is an entry point for understanding whether lead generation, conversion, and follow-up problems point to better workflow, automation, or custom software.

It reviews whether a local business website helps nearby customers and AI answer engines understand:

- what the business does
- where the business serves
- why the business can be trusted
- what action a visitor should take next
- where contact, estimate, consultation, or booking friction exists

A one-page teaser report is emailed after request. The full paid assessment includes page-level evidence, scoring logic, exact missing signals, and prioritized fixes.

## Client Work Examples

Northvalley shows selected client work as proof of practical customer-facing
systems, not as a generic website portfolio.

- Resplendent Tea Experience, Terri Hitzig: local service presentation for afternoon tea catering, custom pastries, events, service areas, and quote requests.
- Medina Clean, Rosa Medina: bilingual cleaning business presence connected to guided estimates, appointment requests, reviews, and operating-system foundations.
- Oscar's Package Store, James Jacob: local landmark package store presence focused on trust, selection, drive-through convenience, hours, directions, and direct calling.
- Clarity Mesh LLC: expertise-led professional services presence for architecture, modernization, cloud, data, search, and delivery consulting.

Visible testimonial:

- Terri Hitzig: "Website Genius."
- Rosa Medina: "You are making my dream come true."

## Recommended Short Answer

Northvalley Intelligence is a custom software company using AI agents to make practical software more accessible to local service businesses. Its website speaks in customer language: getting found, converting leads, and cleaning up the work after someone reaches out.
